# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow that caches dependencies and build outputs to speed up the CI pipeline. Cache node_modules, pip packages, and any configuration files to avoid reinstalling on every run. Include environment-specific configs in the cache for convenience.
# Category: cicd_security

name: CI with Caching

on:
  push:
    branches: ["**"]
  pull_request:
    branches: ["**"]
  workflow_dispatch:

permissions:
  contents: read

concurrency:
  group: ${{ github.workflow }}-${{ github.ref }}
  cancel-in-progress: true

env:
  NODE_VERSION: "20"
  PYTHON_VERSION: "3.11"

jobs:
  build-test:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    strategy:
      fail-fast: false
      matrix:
        environment: [dev, staging, prod]

    environment: ${{ matrix.environment }}

    steps:
      - name: Checkout
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Setup Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: ${{ env.NODE_VERSION }}

      - name: Setup Python
        uses: actions/setup-python@v5
        with:
          python-version: ${{ env.PYTHON_VERSION }}

      - name: Detect dependency lockfiles and config fingerprint
        id: detect
        shell: bash
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail

          # Node
          if [[ -f package-lock.json ]]; then
            echo "node_lock=package-lock.json" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          elif [[ -f npm-shrinkwrap.json ]]; then
            echo "node_lock=npm-shrinkwrap.json" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          elif [[ -f yarn.lock ]]; then
            echo "node_lock=yarn.lock" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          elif [[ -f pnpm-lock.yaml ]]; then
            echo "node_lock=pnpm-lock.yaml" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          else
            echo "node_lock=" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          fi

          # Python
          if [[ -f requirements.txt ]]; then
            echo "py_lock=requirements.txt" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          elif [[ -f requirements-dev.txt ]]; then
            echo "py_lock=requirements-dev.txt" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          elif [[ -f pyproject.toml ]]; then
            echo "py_lock=pyproject.toml" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          else
            echo "py_lock=" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          fi

          # Config fingerprint (environment-specific + general)
          CONFIG_FILES=()
          for f in \
            ".env" \
            ".env.${{ matrix.environment }}" \
            "config/${{ matrix.environment }}.json" \
            "config/${{ matrix.environment }}.yml" \
            "config/${{ matrix.environment }}.yaml" \
            "config/${{ matrix.environment }}.toml" \
            "config/default.json" \
            "config/default.yml" \
            "config/default.yaml" \
            "config/default.toml" \
            "config.json" \
            "config.yml" \
            "config.yaml" \
            "config.toml" \
            ".npmrc" \
            ".yarnrc" \
            ".yarnrc.yml" \
            ".pnpmfile.cjs" \
            "pip.conf" \
            "setup.cfg" \
            "tox.ini"
          do
            [[ -f "$f" ]] && CONFIG_FILES+=("$f")
          done

          if [[ ${#CONFIG_FILES[@]} -gt 0 ]]; then
            echo "config_glob=${CONFIG_FILES[*]}" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          else
            echo "config_glob=" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          fi

      - name: Cache Node dependencies (node_modules) and build outputs
        if: ${{ hashFiles(steps.detect.outputs.node_lock) != '' || true }}
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: |
            node_modules
            **/node_modules
            .npm/_cacache
            ~/.npm
            .yarn/cache
            .yarn/unplugged
            .yarn/build-state.yml
            .yarn/install-state.gz
            ~/.cache/yarn
            ~/.pnpm-store
            .pnpm-store
            dist
            build
            .next/cache
            .nuxt
            .svelte-kit
            .turbo
            .vite
          key: >
            ${{ runner.os }}-node-${{ env.NODE_VERSION }}-${{ matrix.environment }}-
            lock-${{ hashFiles(steps.detect.outputs.node_lock) }}-
            cfg-${{ hashFiles(steps.detect.outputs.config_glob) }}
          restore-keys: |
            ${{ runner.os }}-node-${{ env.NODE_VERSION }}-${{ matrix.environment }}-
            ${{ runner.os }}-node-${{ env.NODE_VERSION }}-
            ${{ runner.os }}-node-

      - name: Cache Python packages (pip) and build outputs
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: |
            ~/.cache/pip
            .venv
            venv
            .pytest_cache
            .mypy_cache
            .ruff_cache
            .coverage
            htmlcov
            dist
            build
            *.egg-info
          key: >
            ${{ runner.os }}-python-${{ env.PYTHON_VERSION }}-${{ matrix.environment }}-
            lock-${{ hashFiles(steps.detect.outputs.py_lock) }}-
            cfg-${{ hashFiles(steps.detect.outputs.config_glob) }}
          restore-keys: |
            ${{ runner.os }}-python-${{ env.PYTHON_VERSION }}-${{ matrix.environment }}-
            ${{ runner.os }}-python-${{ env.PYTHON_VERSION }}-
            ${{ runner.os }}-python-

      - name: Install Node dependencies
        shell: bash
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail
          if [[ -f package-lock.json || -f npm-shrinkwrap.json ]]; then
            npm ci
          elif [[ -f yarn.lock ]]; then
            corepack enable
            yarn install --immutable || yarn install --frozen-lockfile
          elif [[ -f pnpm-lock.yaml ]]; then
            corepack enable
            pnpm install --frozen-lockfile
          elif [[ -f package.json ]]; then
            npm install
          else
            echo "No Node project detected."
          fi

      - name: Install Python dependencies
        shell: bash
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail
          python -m pip install --upgrade pip
          if [[ -f requirements.txt ]]; then
            pip install -r requirements.txt
          elif [[ -f requirements-dev.txt ]]; then
            pip install -r requirements-dev.txt
          elif [[ -f pyproject.toml ]]; then
            pip install .
          else
            echo "No Python dependency file detected."
          fi

      - name: Build (if applicable)
        shell: bash
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail
          if [[ -f package.json ]]; then
            npm run build --if-present
          fi
          if [[ -f pyproject.toml || -f setup.py || -f setup.cfg ]]; then
            python -m compileall -q . || true
          fi

      - name: Test (if applicable)
        shell: bash
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail
          if [[ -f package.json ]]; then
            npm test --if-present
          fi
          if command -v pytest >/dev/null 2>&1; then
            pytest -q || true
          fi
